name: Curried Chicken Crepes
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup sour cream or heavy cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet. Add onion and celery; sauté until just tender-crisp.
3. Stir in flour and seasonings. Cook for 5 minutes.
4. Add broth and bring to a simmer. Cook until thickened, stirring occasionally.
5. Remove from heat. Stir in chicken and sour cream.
6. Place a few heaping tablespoons (or more) of the filling across the center of each crepe, with the brown side out.
7. Roll up each crepe tightly around the filling. Place seam side down in a buttered 13" x 9-inch baking pan.
8. Brush or drizzle the crepes with melted butter.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until hot and bubbling.
10. Top with chutney, peanuts, bacon bits, and shredded coconut before serving.
